en: I just got back from Atlanta. It was a hundred and seven degrees Fahrenheit
The worst thing is everyone comes up to me and they go well you you must be used to this being from Africa and no
I'm from Africa, but that shit is hot. That was just no I
Was scared to go jogging because I thought if I ran out in the streets and fainted wouldn't the local news love that?
I'll be running and I'll fall down in the heat. They would have their vans reporting live
They'd be standing going so hot in Atlanta. Even Africans are fainting
